description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 26 Av 1484 Seleucid = 7 August 1173 CE. Husband: Abū Saʿd b. Abū ʿAlī. Wife: [Sitt al-]Jamīʿ bt. Yūsuf al-Ṣabbāgh. Signed by Shemuel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi and Mevorakh b. Natan ha-Ḥaver. Verso is blank. (Information from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
